# Voxel Game

A third person gameplay prototype on Unreal Engine 5 to experiment with the gameplay 3C (Controls, Character, Camera).

## Overview

This is a simple gameplay prototype on Unreal Engine 5. It contains some basic combat and movements as well as enemy behaviour (patrol and combat).

This project has recently been restarted to become a GAS (Gameplay Ability System) learning project. A complete overhaul of the features is planned in order to take full advantage of GAS. The Github repository will be updated when ready.

## Features

Coming soon.
